creator: js@jschneider.com
text: I was pulling my hair out all day trying to figure out why my jails weren't working with IPv6, and finally figured out they couldn't use their assigned IP addresses.  A few hours later I noticed the "tentative" in ifconfig and eventually stumbled on this PR.  IMO, the lack of "ipv6_activate_all_interfaces" should have no effect on the status of the interfaces when they're explicitly configured in jail settings.
